title: Wind Waker Edition Resource Pack
description:
Explore and settle the NEW HYRULE!

The goal of this resource pack was to create (from the ground up) a Zelda-themed mash-up in the vein of, and matching the quality of the Super Mario Mash-Up that was released for the Wii U/Switch versions of Minecraft.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CgkrywhZVVs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Explore and settle the NEW HYRULE!

The goal of this resource pack was to create (from the ground up) a Zelda-themed mash-up in the vein of, and matching the quality of the Super Mario Mash-Up that was released for the Wii U version of Minecraft. This is mainly themed after Wind Waker but there are numerous pulls from other games in the franchise.

# Compatible With These Mods (And Data Pack):
Here are the Fabric Mods needed to enable all features of the Resource Pack (Optifine should also work):

-Wind Waker Edition Data Pack (for additional paintings among other tweaks):
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/wind-waker-edition-data-pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wind-waker-edition-data-pack)

-CIT Resewn (for the ﻿custom items)
[https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions)

-Continuity (for the connected textures) [https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

-Entity Texture Features (for the mob variants and glowing entities)
[https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

-Entity Model Features (for the custom entity models)
[https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

-Fabric Skyboxes (Get those nice Wind Waker Clouds)
[https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit)

-Fabric API (dependency for certain other mods listed above)
[https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

If you don't already have Fabric, here's where you can dowload the loader:
[https://fabricmc.net/](https://fabricmc.net/)

# What makes this Wind Waker Resource Pack special?

-Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.1

-Compatible with Optifine or modded Fabric (see mod list above)

-100% complete resource pack as of 1.21.1

-Designed specifically for 16x16 texture resolution by a reasonably skilled pixel artist

-Unified, Cohesive design.

-Full music replacement, including two original musical arrangements created by pixeltea. 
  
-I tried to make it a solid resource pack even if you don't know Zelda, so that you still enjoy it even after the initial novelty wears off.

Why is it 16x16 and not HD? A few reasons: Firstly, Nintendo's own official "Super Mario Mash-Up" for Minecraft Wii U was only 16x16 and this pack was inspired by that one. Secondly, I think lower resolution textures mesh better and don't look as awkward on the blocky models of Minecraft. Lastly, by making this in a 16x16 resolution I am able to broaden the scope of the pack for things like including 400+ visually distinct NPCs.
